title: Magical Beef Tagine
description: A keto-friendly Moroccan-inspired beef stew cooked in a flavorful tagine with snappy vegetables.
instructions: In a large Dutch oven, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same pot, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil, then add the cumin powder and cook for 1 minute.
Add the carrots and cook for 5 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the chicken broth, ras el hanout spice blend, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Return the beef to the pot and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer to the preheated oven. Braise for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Serve the beef and carrots hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
